dashboard.title: AlphaForge Trading Overview
dashboard.description: Comprehensive trading platform dashboard: performance, risk, execution quality, system health, and market data.

panels.title: Equity Curve
panels.description: Portfolio equity over time

panels.title: Daily PnL
panels.description: Current day profit and loss

panels.title: Win Rate
panels.description: Ratio of filled orders to total orders

panels.title: Sharpe Ratio
panels.description: Rolling annualized Sharpe ratio

panels.title: Max Drawdown
panels.description: Current drawdown percentage from peak equity

panels.title: Cumulative PnL
panels.description: Total cumulative profit and loss

panels.title: VaR / Drawdown Trend
panels.description: Value at Risk and drawdown percentage over time

panels.title: Circuit Breaker State
panels.description: Trading circuit breaker: CLOSED = normal, OPEN = halted

panels.title: Kill Switch
panels.description: Kill switch state: SAFE = normal, ARMED = trading halted

panels.title: Open Positions
panels.description: Number of currently open positions

panels.title: Portfolio Heat
panels.description: Portfolio heat: sum of absolute position values / equity

panels.title: Risk Rejections by Reason
panels.description: Order rejections by the risk engine, broken down by reason

panels.title: Safe Mode
panels.description: Whether platform is operating in safe/degraded mode

panels.title: Kill Switch Events
panels.description: Kill switch trigger events by reason

panels.title: Order Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
panels.description: Order submission pipeline latency percentiles

panels.title: Fill Rate
panels.description: Ratio of filled orders to total submitted orders

panels.title: Slippage Ratio
panels.description: Realized vs expected slippage ratio (1.0 = on target, >1.5 = degraded)

panels.title: Orders per Minute
panels.description: Rate of order submissions, fills, and rejections

panels.title: Rejection Rate
panels.description: Current order rejection rate from execution quality tracker

panels.title: Broker API Latency (p95)
panels.description: Broker API call latency by operation at the 95th percentile

panels.title: Fill Latency (p50 / p95)
panels.description: Time from fill at broker to fill applied in the system

panels.title: Error Rate (5xx / Broker)
panels.description: Broker errors and failures over time

panels.title: Memory Usage
panels.description: Process resident memory bytes (RSS)

panels.title: CPU Usage
panels.description: Process CPU seconds consumption rate

panels.title: API Health
panels.description: Whether the trading API target is up

panels.title: WebSocket Connections
panels.description: Active WebSocket connections

panels.title: Reconciliation Mismatches
panels.description: Position reconciliation and fill mismatches

panels.title: Startup Recovery p95
panels.description: Cold start recovery duration at the 95th percentile

panels.title: Fill Events Rate
panels.description: Rate of fill events by type (live, paper, simulated)

panels.title: AI Model Confidence
panels.description: Ensemble and individual model confidence scores

panels.title: ML Models Loaded
panels.description: Number of ML models currently loaded in memory

panels.title: Drift Events
panels.description: Concept drift detection events (cumulative)

panels.title: Autonomous Loop Ticks
panels.description: Number of autonomous trading loop ticks

panels.title: Open Trades (Auto Loop)
panels.description: Trades currently tracked by the autonomous loop

panels.title: Model Retrains
panels.description: Model retraining events showing which models were retrained and whether they replaced the old model

panels.title: Current Regime
panels.description: Current market regime detected by AI models

panels.title: Duplicate Prevention
panels.description: Duplicate orders and fills prevented by idempotency checks
